title: Fishmod X Core
description: This mod adds some features to resemble some classic tech mods, such as buildcraft.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93cac12272ba4729430313c69cde61b3742023d4.png)
# Fishmod X

This is the core mod for an upcoming modpack, Fishmod X

There are a great number of blocks, items, and other things that are useful for modpacks, tech mod players, and more. Read the ingame GuideME for more information!
